# PinInput

A PIN/OTP code input component that renders a series of individual character inputs. Ideal for verification codes.

## Import

```jsx
import { PinInput, PinInputField, PinInputControl, PinInputLabel } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `PinInput` | The root wrapper (renders `PinInput.Root`). Manages the overall pin input state |
| `PinInputField` | An individual character input field |
| `PinInputControl` | Container that wraps the individual input fields |
| `PinInputLabel` | Label for the pin input |

## PinInput (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `length` | `number` | `4` | The number of input fields to render |
| `placeholder` | `string` | `"_"` | Placeholder character for empty fields |
| `otp` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to use OTP autocomplete attributes |
| `mask` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to mask the input (like a password) |
| `value` | `string[]` | - | Controlled value array |
| `defaultValue` | `string[]` | - | Initial value for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when any input changes |
| `onValueComplete` | `(details: { value: string[], valueAsString: string }) => void` | - | Callback fired when all fields are filled |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<PinInput>
  <PinInputLabel>Enter verification code</PinInputLabel>
  <PinInputControl>
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
  </PinInputControl>
</PinInput>
```

### With OTP autocomplete

```jsx
<PinInput otp>
  <PinInputControl>
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
  </PinInputControl>
</PinInput>
```

### Masked input

```jsx
<PinInput mask>
  <PinInputLabel>Enter your PIN</PinInputLabel>
  <PinInputControl>
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
  </PinInputControl>
</PinInput>
```

### With completion callback

```jsx
<PinInput onValueComplete={(e) => console.log("Code:", e.valueAsString)}>
  <PinInputControl>
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
    <PinInputField />
  </PinInputControl>
</PinInput>
```

## Features

- Compound component pattern with individual character fields
- Automatic focus management between fields
- OTP autocomplete support for mobile devices
- Masked input option for sensitive codes
- Callback when all fields are completed
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
